text.title: Chunking Strategies
text.summary: Five chunking strategies: fixed-size, sentence, paragraph, semantic, and Markdown-header with selection criteria.

list.item: Fixed-size (500 chars, 50 overlap): fast, predictable, sufficient for most prose corpora
Sentence-based: better for factual Q&A where answers align with sentence boundaries
Paragraph-based: preserves logical units in blog posts and documentation
Semantic (embedding-based splits): highest quality, highest cost — use for complex multi-topic docs
Markdown-header: natural for technical docs; preserves heading context in each chunk
